title: quercus lanuginosa subsp. cerrioides
intro: Quercus lanuginosa subsp. cerrioides, also known as the Chinese cork tree, is a subspecies of evergreen tree belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). The bark and leaves of this plant are used in traditional Chinese medicine, which is known for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus lanuginosa subsp. cerrioides include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make capsules, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
